regime_fall.current_status: The Iranian regime faces a decisive military collapse with over 12,300 targets hit and 155+ vessels destroyed, while simultaneously experiencing a succession crisis with hardliner Mojtaba Khamenei appointing hardline security officials, yet mixed diplomatic signals emerge as both sides hint at negotiations while maintaining rhetorical escalation.
regime_fall.last_major_event: U.S. Central Command reported over 12,300 targets hit, 155+ Iranian vessels damaged or destroyed, and 13,000 combat flights flown as of April 1, 2026, while Iran announced new waves of missile attacks and appointed hardline security officials, signaling both military desperation and succession instability.
